positive: A detailed, high-contrast geometric illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset, rendered with negative space techniques. The foreground features abstract, layered natural forms (trees, peaks) filled with varying geometric patterns (triangles, hexagons, stripes) and ethereal gradients of deep indigo, burnt orange, and teal. Composition is highly centered and symmetrical, designed for maximal impact on a single garment. Clean lines, vector art aesthetic meets modern woodcut engraving. The overall feel should be mythical, adventurous, and zen. Studio lighting, highly saturated but balanced colors, perfect for screen printing.
